title: Moderation Update: April 28, 2026
body:
The abuse queue has been triaged. Two high-severity cases were actioned:

- Banned user 'spam_wave_42' for posting phishing links across 6 channels (report_001)
- Banned user 'toxic_runner' for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers (report_002)

One report against 'core_maintainer' was identified as a false positive from brigading and closed without action. All remaining reports are at lower severity and remain open for further review.

Thank you for keeping the community safe.
